identity.name: GitOracle
identity.visual_mood: Tactical Noir, Terminal Aesthetics, High Contrast

layout.grid_system: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

search_bar.style: h-16 text-lg bg-background border-2 border-border focus-visible:border-primary focus-visible:ring-0 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] transition-all duration-300

card.base: group relative bg-card border border-border/50 overflow-hidden hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300
card.footer: p-4 bg-accent/10 flex items-center justify-between text-xs font-mono text-muted-foreground

button.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,176,0,0.3)] font-bold tracking-tight uppercase text-sm px-6 py-3 rounded-none
button.secondary: bg-secondary/10 text-secondary hover:bg-secondary/20 border border-secondary/20 font-mono text-xs px-4 py-2 rounded-none

badge.default: border-transparent bg-primary/20 text-primary hover:bg-primary/30 rounded-none px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-mono uppercase tracking-wider
badge.outline: text-foreground border-border rounded-none px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-mono uppercase tracking-wider

workflow: 1. SETUP: Configure Tailwind theme in `tailwind.config.js` with the provided colors, fonts, and border radius.
2. FONTS: Import 'Chivo', 'Manrope', and 'JetBrains Mono' from Google Fonts in `index.css`.
3. COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn components in `src/components/ui` to match the 'Tactical Noir' aesthetic (remove heavy roundness, increase contrast).
4. LAYOUT: Build the main `SearchPage` with a large, central search bar and a responsive masonry grid for results.
5. FEATURES: Implement the GitHub API integration with a token input modal (Settings).
6. POLISH: Add 'tracing beam' borders to cards and staggered entrance animations.
critical_rules: DO NOT use gradients for text. Keep text solid for readability.
Ensure all interactive elements have a focus state visible via keyboard navigation.
Use `data-testid` on all buttons, inputs, and cards.
Handle GitHub API rate limits gracefully (show a friendly error or prompt for token).
NO 'Lorem Ipsum' - use realistic mock data if API fails.

tech_stack_specifics.state_management: React Context or Zoning (Keep it simple)

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) sparingly (only on sticky headers).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
